case_title: CHEUNG, C. K. vs. ZALAMEDA, CEZAR V. et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, C. K.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ZALAMEDA, CEZAR V. ZALAMEDA, REBECCA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZALAMEDA, CEZAR V. ZALAMEDA, REBECCA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4452 MISSION ST, S.F, CA. $7,878.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,878.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-15-1993, IF DEFS PAY $7,878 BY 9-15-93, THEY WILL BE RESTORED TO ORIG INAL RENTAL AGREEMENT & POSSESSION OF PREMISES. SEE FILE FOR JUDGMENT DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, C. K. AS TO DEFENDANT ZALAMEDA, CEZAR V. ZALAMEDA, REBECCA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, C. K. COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-28-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/KURT HUYSENTRUYT AS COUNSEL. DEF.PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULA- TION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 4452 MISSION ST. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 9-15-93. $7,878 RENT & DAMAGES THAT INCLUDES THE RENTAL PERIOD OF 3-1-93 TO 9-15-93. IF DEF. PAYS THE $7,878 BY 9-15-93, THE JUDGMENT WILL BE VACATED & DEF WILL BE RESTORED TO THE PREMISES W/ORIGINAL RENTAL TERMS. $1,600 SECURITY DEPOSIT WILL BE CREDITED TOWARD R&D OWED. IF DEF IS RESTORED TO THE PREMISES THE SECURITY DEPOSIT MAY BE PAID IN $200 INTALLMENTS BEGINNING 12-1-93 UNTIL THE FULL $1600 IS RE- STORED. EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS & ATTY FEES. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ZALAMEDA, CEZAR V. ZALAMEDA, REBECCA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
